items.subject: Jungle Grid and mcp-worker
items.body:
Hi Morgan,

I read the public docs for mcp-worker and noticed MCP Worker lets agent clients launch observable batch inference tasks. I’m building Jungle Grid: Durable managed execution for inference, workers, retries, logs, and artifacts. Jungle Grid is meant to add routed compute capacity without making you own the execution layer.

The reason I reached out is that MCP Worker lets agent clients launch observable batch inference tasks. That detail matches the audience and operating signals configured for this campaign.

If that is a live problem for you, the shortest overview is https://junglegrid.dev.

Benedict
personalization_claims: MCP Worker lets agent clients launch observable batch inference tasks
